nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 艾氏雕
nodes.summary: 艾氏雕（Ayres's hawk-eagle，学名 Hieraaetus ayresii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括猎捕压力。
nodes.shortSummary: 艾氏雕（拉丁文學名：Hieraaetus ayresii）是一種隼雕，可以在撒哈拉沙漠以南的非洲各地發現它們的蹤影。 參考資料 BirdLife International 2004.

nodes.name: 艾氏雕
nodes.summary: 艾氏雕（Hieraaetus ayresii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如艾氏雕。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Hieraaetus
nodes.summary: Hieraaetus（Hieraaetus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Wahlberg's eagle、艾氏雕、Pygmy eagle等5种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Ayres's hawk-eagle has a patchy sub-Saharan distribution ranging from Sierra Leone east to Somalia, and south to northern Namibia and northeast South Africa. Its central range is from the southern Democratic Republic of the Congo and southern Uganda down almost throughout Kenya, Tanzania, Zambia and Mozambique as well as much of Angola to northeastern Namibia, northern Botswana and northern Zimbabwe. In the rainy season moves out of denser and taller deciduous woodlands of central Africa into more open albeit treed savanna habitat further south, and probably into coastal East Africa; as the rains cause the leaves to emerge turning woodland into forests and tree savanna into woodland

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Although Ayres's hawk-eagle is an uncommon bird throughout its range, it is classified as Least Concern (LC) by the IUCN, due to its large range and its numbers, while small, appearing stable at the present time. The estimated global population is only 1000 to 10,000 individuals. The main threat faced by the species is cutting of woodland. Furthermore, it is persecuted at times for hunting down domestic pigeons

links.label: 属于门
links.evidence: 依据 birds.csv 分类字段补充：鸟纲 属于门 脊索动物门。

links.label: 属于界
links.evidence: 依据 birds.csv 分类字段补充：脊索动物门 属于界 动物界。

links.label: 属于属
links.evidence: 依据 birds.csv 分类字段补充：艾氏雕 属于属 Hieraaetus。
